Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley for and with Alexandra Frick Escher.
Walter Frick (Respondent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Collin stated that the individual Trustee's have been communicating, that Mr. Frick is non-responsive to him, that his Client would like for Mr. Frick to communicate with him as well and that a third party is needed. Mr. Frick stated that he is in the opinion that there is a settlement agreement that can be validated and consummated, that the parties were in communication everyday last week and that there is communication between the principals. The Court finds that the Trustees currently can not work together in order to administer this Trust. The Court orders removal of the Trustees pursuant to the amended petition effective May 9, 2017 with Mr. Trutner appointed as Successor Trustee on that same date with bond in the amount of $3,000,000.00. Mr. Collin is to provide a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley for and with Alexandra Escher.
Walter Frick (Respondent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Frick stated that there has been no communication and that he objects to removal of the current Co-Trustees and appointment of a neutral Fiduciary. The Petition for Instructions Concerning Payment of Rent, etc. is continued to April 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Frick to file his objection in response to the amendment no later than April 3, 2017. The Court encouraged the Parties to communicate and try to come to some agreement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Continued To Mar-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley for and with Alexandra Escher.
Walter Frick (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kelley stated that they no longer have a settlement, that they went back and forth for three weeks, and that they were unable to come to settlement terms. Mr. Kelley also stated that appointment of a third party Trustee is necessary to move administration of the Trust forward. Mr. Frick stated that he objects and that Counsel for the Petitioner was unable to produce a document. The Petition for Instructions Concerning Payment of Rent, etc. is continued to March 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Kelley for and with (petitioner) Alexandra Frick Escher. Walter Frick in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it looks like the parties have reached a settlement. Mr. Kelley stated that they have reached an agreement regarding a buyout, that there are still finalizing the small details, that they are close to completion and that they hope the settlement will result in a dismissal. The Court continued the Petition for Instructions Concerning Payment of Rent, etc., to February 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and expects that the parties will have resolved the issues. Mr. Kelley stated that they expect to have a dismissal filed prior to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Continued To Nov-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Kelley for (petitioner) Alexandra Frick Escher. Walter Frick in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is in a form that the Court can act on, that the parties were to talk to each other, that there is now a change in attorneys and a request for a discontinuance which is not recognizable to the Court. Mr. Kelley reported that there has been no progress, that Mr. Frick is not returning calls or responding to correspondence, that they have a petition to the Court to issue an order to sell the property per the terms of the trust and that they are willing to mediate. The Court stated that it is not clear that the relief requested is appropriate and that other steps may be necessary. Mr. Kelley stated that the terms of the trust are clear and that if the beneficiaries cannot agree the Court's involvement is appropriate. Mr. Frick stated that he is willing to mediate if the forgery/perjury issue is resolved first. The Court stated that the concerns regarding the substitution of attorney have been put to rest and that you do not get to decide who her attorney is. Mr. Frick stated that there are 3 documents with different signatures. The Court stated that the only issue is who is representing her, that it urges Mr. Frick to obtain counsel and that it is happy to set a mediation schedule. Mr. Frick stated that he would like an opportunity to speak with counsel. The Court stated that it encourages the petitioner to review the form that this petition is in. The Petition for Instructions Concerning Payment of Rent, Sale of Trust Assets and Distribution to Beneficiaries was continued to November 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow time for Mr. Frick to get an attorney and for the parties to talk to each other.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Concerning Payment Of Rent, Sale Of Trust Assets, And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Kelley for (co-trustee) Alexandra Frick Escher. Pamela Louie for and with Walter Frick III.

The Court stated that this is a petition for instructions regarding a dispute between 2 trustees, that it does not know that this is the right way to present this and that it is not sure it can decide that one trustee is right. Mr. Kelley reported that counsel spoke yesterday, that they agree that they should be able to work this out and that they need a continuance to do so. The Court asked the ages of the beneficiaries. Mr. Frick responded that he is 73 years old and that his sister is 71. The Petition for Instructions concerning payment of rent, etc., was continued to August 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
